notes: Ghost Battles config + data model. A 'ghost' is the recorded per-interval strike output of a completed, VERIFIED Fight Mode session. You race against its replay: no live multiplayer, just a saved-numbers playback (like a racing-game ghost lap). Engine: protocol-src/engine/ghost-engine.ts. Designer visuals: design 40d.

ghost_record.description: What every ghost stores. Small — just enough to replay pace and show identity.

shape.buckets: number[] — strikes per 10-second interval across the whole session (work phases; rest buckets are 0)
shape.verified: bool — ONLY sessions that passed the anti-cheat integrity check can become ghosts
shape.created_at: timestamp (stamped by app, not the engine)

ghost_record.rule: Only verified sessions become ghosts. Unverified sessions are never offered as a challenge — this is the 'no fake scores' guarantee and a marketing point.

battle_result.tiebreak: Higher best_round wins; still tied → draw.
battle_result.xp: Victory grants bonus XP; a loss still grants the normal session XP (never punish showing up).

always_available: MY_BEST — the user's own best verified ghost for the chosen mode/discipline
sources: RECENT_GHOSTS — ghosts the user downloaded via challenge code/link
CHALLENGE_CODE — a shared code/link a friend sent
SUGGESTED — a ghost near the user's level (see selection)
matchmaking.selection_for_suggested: Prefer a ghost whose total_strikes is within ~15% of the user's own best for that mode — a beatable-but-challenging race. Fall back to MY_BEST if none.
matchmaking.format_rule: A ghost battle inherits the ghost's rounds_config — you fight its format so the comparison is fair. Show it read-only on setup.

combo_coach_icon.where: A small ghost icon (👻) on the Combo Coach setup screen, present from the start (per user request + designer 40d).
combo_coach_icon.tap: Opens the ghost opponent picker (MY BEST / recent / enter code) → starts a ghost battle using Combo Coach as the session.
combo_coach_icon.empty_state: If the user has no ghost yet, the icon still shows and explains: 'Finish a session to create your first ghost, then race it.'

vs_popup.where: An occasional VS-mode pop-up (framed like a fighting-game 'VS' screen).
vs_popup.when: Fires at most once every ~2-3 days, and ONLY when there is something real to react to: a newly downloaded friend ghost, or 'someone beat your challenge' (a friend's session beat a ghost you set).

cadence_rules.dismissible: Always dismissible; dismissing does not re-prompt the same event.

vs_popup.content: Both avatars faced off, the challenge (e.g. 'RYAN threw 214 — beat it') and a gold 'ACCEPT · VS' CTA that starts the matching session; a 'later' option.

set_as_challenge.where: On every VERIFIED Fight Mode Mission Complete / outcome screen.
set_as_challenge.action: Generates a short challenge code / share link; the recipient enters it to download the ghost and race it. Only verified sessions can be set as a challenge.

privacy.opt_in: Sharing a ghost is user-initiated (SET AS CHALLENGE) — sessions are never auto-published.
privacy.data_shared: Only the ghost_record fields above (pace buckets + display identity). No location, no health data.
privacy.friend_ghosts_are_read_only: Downloaded ghosts replay locally; they are recordings, not live connections.
